description: Binary pass/fail criteria for skill self-improvement loop

criteria.name: pass_rate_improved
criteria.description: Overall eval suite pass rate must exceed baseline

criteria.name: no_category_regression
criteria.description: No individual eval category drops below its baseline pass rate

criteria.name: no_new_failure_modes
criteria.description: Previously passing eval cases must not start failing

criteria.name: execution_time_stable
criteria.description: Average skill execution time must not increase more than 50%

criteria.name: minimum_eval_cases
criteria.description: At least 20 eval cases in the suite before running self-improvement

criteria.name: change_is_targeted
criteria.description: SKILL.md diff is small and targeted (not a full rewrite)

criteria.name: max_iterations_respected
criteria.description: No more than 5 improvement iterations per run
